Platform Overview

Symbiotic Finance combines the power of asset-backed loans with Eigen Layer restaking to maximize capital efficiency.

Our platform allows you to:

  • Take out loans backed by real-world assets
  • Restake your SFT tokens on Eigen Layer AVS
  • Earn additional rewards while maintaining liquidity
  • Delegate your restaked tokens to operators
  • Deposit LST tokens into yield-generating pools
